// WHAT WE DO

From a single panel to a fully off-grid farm.

Roof, ground or pole mount. Solar PV, Kohler generators, and full electrical — engineered for your site.

Residential Solar PV

Grid-tied, hybrid and off-grid systems sized for your home — roof, ground or pole mount.

Ground-Mount Arrays

Field, yard and ag-site installs. Better tilt, easier service, no roof penetrations.

Commercial & Ag Solar

Custom systems for businesses, farms and ag operations — USDA REAP-grant eligible.

Kohler Backup Generators

Authorized Kohler installer — automatic standby power that's ready 24/7.

Electrical Install & Repair

32 years of full-service electrical from a licensed, insured team.

LED & Energy Monitoring

Smart lighting and live energy monitoring to lower your usage.

Get my free estimate

Family-owned solar & electrical contractor serving Indiana and Illinois since 1994.
